note: Structured digest of the 1.14.4 patch notes. Hand-captured from the source above, then applied by scripts/apply-patch.js, which stacks all patch files in order (latest trend wins per hero). Update this file and re-run the script when a new patch drops. NOTE: 1.14.2 and 1.14.3 digests were not captured; this stacks directly on 1.14.1.
global: Durability meta dialed back: tower, inhibitor, minion, and jungle monster health/damage increased across the board to make pushing and objective trades slower and more deliberate (e.g. Outer Tower 5000->5800 HP, Inner 4000->5000, Inhibitor 3800->4500; Super Minion HP 1600-4820->1600-5240 but its damage to inhibitors/core reduced).

Patch-wide kit theme: many physical-scaling heroes gained Magical Power / Bonus Physical Power scaling on abilities, opening hybrid and AP-bruiser build paths (Akeron, Boris, Greystone, Grux, Howitzer, Khaimera, Kwang, Rampage, Riktor, Shinbi, Yin, Zarus, and others).
Headline target is the Eternals durability/sustain meta — see systems[] and data/game-data/eternals.json for blessing reworks.

systems.name: Eternals
systems.summary: Broad rebalance of the durability/sustain meta. Notable: Vermis Serration reworked (now 4% target missing-health on activation) and Cauterize soft-reworked; Marrow The Maw soft-rework (12% true dmg vs <30% HP, moved to Cat 2) and Leech radius 400->550 / regen-steal 100->200% (moved to Cat 1); Thraex Golden Mane DR 12->8% (now all non-AoE); Krix Major Blessing max-HP 10->5% and Voracity/Regenerative Tissue trimmed; Xyris Major now flat 4% + 0.6%/10u dmg amp, Iron Will and Bone Collector reworked, Eviscerate 20->15%; Lotus Major 1.75->1.5%, Immaculate DR 35->20%, Fragrance soft-rework; Demiurge Bloatware 1->0.5% (Cat 2) and Construct reworked (Cat 1); Aion economy buffs; Phylactery soft-rework (100% CD progression for 3s, shield 20->15%, 4s->3s). Values in data/game-data/eternals.json still reflect 1.14.1 and need updating.

items: Crests: Razorback Echidna armor bonus 25%->20%, cooldown 90->100s.
Carry: Sky Splitter lifesteal 7%->8% (melee dmg 6->5.5%, ranged 4->3.5%); Stormbreaker attack speed 35->30; Viper shred 4%->4.5% (+armor-correction bugfix).
Assassin: Deathstalker penetration 9->10; Infernum Cinder max-health 3%->4%; Nightfall omnivamp 7%->8%.

Fighter: Augmentation ability haste 16->20 / scaling 80->90%; Mutilator power 40->45 & omnivamp 10->12%; Vyzar-Carapace power 40->45 & health 200->225; Basilisk shred 4->4.5%; Solstice Mornfall 0-60%->0-55%.
Mage: Orb of Growth mana 300->250; Orb of Enlightenment mana 300->250 & scaling 4->3/level.
Tank: Cursed Scroll health scaling 5->4% & regen 30->25% (+Cleave-trigger bugfix).
Tier 2 / fixes: Ruthless Broadsword shred 4->4.5%; Refillable Potion (135-270) and Divine Potion (165-300) healing labels corrected.

changes: Crushing Maw magical scaling 40%->45%, added 75% Bonus Physical Power
Consume bite and execute threshold now scale with Bonus Physical Power
Web Lash slam now scales 50% Bonus Physical Power
Make It Rain added 120% Bonus Physical total
Ancestral Fury added 0.3% Magical Power/stack, rage 3->4 per attack
Light of Heavens added 70% Bonus Physical (true dmg +80% Bonus Physical)
Behemoth movement speed added 10% Magical Power scaling
Crescendo added 25% Bonus Physical, Biting Melody added 10%
Circle Rhythm and Rushing Beat per-rank damage increased
Spear of Nyr damage 70-190->70-210, scaling 115%->125%, +25% monster damage reduction, added 80% Magical
Dire Howl added 65% Magical Power, omnivamp 6-10%->10-18%
Ability mana costs rebalanced (Gift 60-100->70-90, Fly 60-100->80-100, Sparkle 75->60-80)
Flame Turret melee modifier +50%->+70% but scaling 10-36%->10-32.5%, mana 20->30
Glacial Thorns magical scaling 30%->20%, root 0.6s->0.5s (hitbox trimmed)
Added Magical Power scaling to Tesseract Device and Detection Protocol
Eventide damage curve lowered at higher ranks
Stone Forged Soul cooldown 165/150/135->175/160/145 (added 100% Magical Power, healing +2.5% Magical)
Sacred Oath mana 25->30, Make Way added 80% Magical
Bloodlust added 20% Magical to bleed, Warlord's Challenge steal added 1.5% Magical
Physical Power growth 2->1.6, mana growth 46->42, mana regen growth 0.18->0.15
Ballistic Calibration missing-health 10%->8%, Orbital Sanction damage/scaling lowered
Added Bonus Physical scaling to Zap O'9-Chains (30%) and Shock Therapy (70%)
Reaper of Souls health/stack 3->1, tier bonuses 40/80/120/160->50/100/200/400
Piercing Shot damage 85-245->80-220, Inner Fire scaling 70%->75%
Ruthless Assault armor scaling 40%->37.5% (empowered damage curve lowered)
Wild Rush minimum scaling 40%->37.5%, max charge 120%->112.5%
Rising Storm max stacks 5->6 but speed 5-6.5%->3/4/5/6%
Silksong scaling 80%->75% Bonus Physical, Windburn max-health 3-6%->2-5%
Added Magical Power scaling to Lash Kick (80%) and Backlash (60%)
